siteDefaultDescription: Scaffold production-ready fullstack apps in seconds. Pick your stack from {optionCount} options across {ecosystems} — frameworks, databases, auth, payments, AI, and deployment — all wired together by one CLI.
homeSeoTitle: Better Fullstack — Scaffold Production-Ready Fullstack Apps in Seconds
builderSeoDescription: Build and share custom fullstack combinations with the Better Fullstack visual stack builder.
compareSeoTitle: Compare Fullstack Scaffolding Tools | Better Fullstack
compareSeoDescription: See how Better Fullstack compares to create-t3-app, create-next-app, and other CLI scaffolding tools. Side-by-side feature comparison across ecosystems, auth, payments, databases, and more.
mcpSeoTitle: MCP Server — AI Agent Integration | Better Fullstack
mcpSeoDescription: Connect AI coding agents to Better Fullstack via MCP. Let Claude, Cursor, VS Code Copilot, and other agents scaffold fullstack projects programmatically.
sharedStackSeoDescription: Open a shared Better Fullstack builder configuration.
shortStackSeoDescription: Open a short Better Fullstack builder configuration link.
notFoundText: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
homeHeroDescription: A CLI that scaffolds production-ready fullstack apps across five language ecosystems. Pick your stack — frontend, database, auth, payments, AI — and run one command.
homeFeaturesDescription: TypeScript, React Native, Rust, Python, Go, Java, Elixir — one CLI scaffolds production-ready apps across all seven. Pick your ecosystem, pick your stack.
homeTotalDescription: Multiply this by every database, every CSS framework, every AI SDK, and you get more combinations than there are grains of sand.
homeTotalOptions: options across 7 ecosystems · ts · rn · rust · go · python · java · elixir
homeCombinationsDescription: Mix and match frameworks, databases, auth, payments, AI, and more. Every combination scaffolds a working, production-ready codebase.
homeFactUniverseLifetimes: {mantissa} × 10^{exponent} universe lifetimes to test all combinations
homeFactSand: {mantissa} × 10^{exponent}× more combinations than grains of sand in the observable universe
homeFactEcosystems: Across TypeScript, React Native, Rust, Python, Go, and Java
homeFactUnique: Each combination scaffolds a unique, production-ready app
homeFactYolo: YOLO mode doubles every single one of them
homeTestimonialsDescriptionC: by people who shipped with it.
homeContributorsDescription: Special thanks to the contributors who help improve Better Fullstack through testing, feedback, and code.
blogDescription: Benchmarks, releases, and what we learn building a fullstack scaffolder — written up with the data attached.
changelogRelease20260612Title: Agent benchmark, .NET ecosystem, and a 42% lighter install
changelogRelease20260612Summary: This release benchmarks how AI agents scaffold with Better Fullstack and publishes the results on the homepage, adds .NET as a first-class ecosystem on the new stack graph, and ships a much leaner install. It also fixes four scaffold bugs the benchmark itself uncovered.
changelogRelease20260612HighlightBenchma: Benchmarked frontier models scaffolding the same project specs three ways: prompt-only, our CLI, and our MCP server. Agents on the MCP path finished up to 7× faster with 4× fewer output tokens; the full results live on the homepage with an interactive chart.
changelogRelease20260612HighlightMcp: Redesigned the MCP page with one-paste setup for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, Windsurf, and Zed.
changelogRelease20260612HighlightDotnet: Added .NET as a first-class ecosystem, plus an enterprise tier, backend-utils, and Render/Netlify deployment options on the stack graph.
changelogRelease20260612HighlightInstall: Cut install size by 42% (122 MB → 71 MB) and the web entry chunk by 32%.
changelogRelease20260612HighlightTracks: Added starter tracks: curated, goal-based stack presets for common product shapes.
changelogRelease20260612HighlightStorybo: Fixed Storybook scaffolds on Next.js projects: framework detection now handles multi-frontend stacks and story types import from the renderer package, so generated apps type-check and build.
changelogRelease20260612HighlightMulti: Fixed multi-ecosystem database packages missing their ORM dependencies and auth schema, and added the missing expo-network dependency for Better Auth on the unistyles native template.
shareTweetText:
Check out this tech stack I configured with Better Fullstack!

{count} technologies selected
compareIntro: Most scaffolding tools handle one framework and one opinion. Better Fullstack gives you {optionCount} options across {ecosystemCount} ecosystems — frontend, backend, database, auth, payments, AI, and deployment — all preconfigured and ready to run.
compareReadyDescription: Configure your stack visually or jump straight into the CLI.
mcpHeroDescription: Give coding agents structured access to Better Fullstack. They can inspect options, validate combinations, preview file trees, and scaffold projects without guessing CLI flags.
mcpToolsDescription: The server exposes narrow, typed tools for guidance, schema lookup, compatibility checks, dry runs, creation, and adding features.
mcpWorkflowDescription: Agents use the same schema and compatibility rules as the web builder, so generated commands match what users can configure visually.
mcpFinalDescription: In ScaffBench, MCP-guided project creation is faster and more reliable than asking an agent to hand-write a project from scratch.
mcpToolGuidanceDescription: Workflow rules, field semantics, and critical constraints
mcpToolSchemaDescription: Valid options for any category, filterable by ecosystem
mcpToolPlanDescription: Dry-run preview: generates the file tree in memory
mcpToolCreateDescription: Scaffold a new project to disk
mcpToolPlanAdditionDescription: Validate proposed addons for an existing project
mcpToolAddFeatureDescription: Add features to an existing project
mcpTipFrontendArray: frontend is an array: multiple frontends in one monorepo
mcpTipSetEcosystemFirst: Set ecosystem first: it decides which fields matter
mcpTipDependenciesNeverInstalled: Dependencies are never installed: your agent will tell you the install command
mcpTerminalExample: Create a fullstack TypeScript app with Next.js, Hono, Drizzle, and PostgreSQL.
llmBenchmarkDescription: Measuring coding agents on real fullstack scaffolding tasks — time, tokens, cost, and whether the result actually builds.
llmScatterAria: Benchmark scatter chart: each point is one model and creation path
llmPathCliDetail: agent composes the Better-Fullstack CLI command
llmPathPromptDetail: no Better-Fullstack — agent hand-writes every file
llmAgentTitle: Give your agent the fast path.
llmAgentDescription: One MCP server, every spec-to-scaffold tool the benchmark used. Pick your agent, paste, done.
builderSaveCurrentStackTooltip: Save the current stack as a named preset
builderResetTooltip: Reset all builder options to defaults
builderUpdatePresetDescriptionNamed: Updating "{name}" will override the saved preset with your current stack configuration.
builderUpdatePresetDescription: Updating this preset will override the saved preset with your current stack configuration.
builderGroupedAddonsDescription: platforms, integrations, AI agents, and TanStack extras are split below. MCP and Skills still add the addon flags first, then the CLI asks follow-up questions to configure them.
builderSelectFileToView: Select a file to view its content
builderPreviewInfoDescription: This is a static template preview. Files are not formatted. Some features like database provider setup (Turso, Neon, Supabase, etc.) and certain addons (Fumadocs, Starlight, Tauri, etc.) require CLI execution and are not shown here.
builderYoloTooltip: Disables all validation and adds --yolo flag to the command. Use at your own risk!
savedDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
savedFullConfig: Full saved configuration for this preset.
savedDescription: Use the save icon in the builder bar to create local presets, then load or update them here.
savedEmptyDescription: Save the current builder configuration to create a reusable preset for yourself. These entries stay in local storage on this browser.
presetTrackSaasDescription: Next.js with auth, relational data, payments, email, and a deployment-ready app shape.
presetTrackAiAgentDescription: A Next.js workspace prepared for AI CLI flows, MCP, skills, and generated agent docs.
presetTrackRestApiDescription: FastAPI with SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, Ruff, and a small API-first Python project layout.
presetTrackJavaApiDescription: Spring Boot with security, JPA, migrations, and test coverage for backend teams.
presetTrackRustBackendDescription: Axum and SeaORM for a compact Rust backend with typed persistence and observability hooks.
presetTrackMobileAppDescription: Expo with Uniwind for a native-first app shell before backend services are needed.
presetTrackInternalToolDescription: TanStack Router, Hono, Drizzle, auth, and tRPC for product dashboards and admin tools.
